title: Verify P3T19 force-with-lease retry on rerun push
description: P3T19 is a Phase 3 verification test from the Kody engine E2E suite. The @kody comment in task.md triggered the external Kody engine pipeline. This task verifies that when a git push is rejected during a rerun (due to stale remote ref), the engine retries with --force-with-lease. The Kody engine source lives in an external repository (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine) — no application code changes are needed in Kody-Engine-Tester. Verification confirms the pipeline ran and produced correct logs.
